500b1(cha): ang med stabs bla ma a g.yung can des gtso bsdur byas pa yin/ de la bris pas chad nor mang ba dang / myang 'das 'gres la bab 'jigs can gyi dang tshugs segs dmigs gsal can 'drug/ ma dpo khro yar can nang myang 
500b2(cha): 'das 'gres la bab 'jegs ma byas pad ma chang gi 'gre sangs 'dag pasogs gco dpo de la brgyaud bcos med pad per gnag byas theg/ gang gsal bsnad dpo de'i dog mtshan yed pa rnams kyis mad nod mongon gsal / 
500b3(cha): can la cha brkangs byas te/ ge bon mdzod lnga'i dpo rnying phyogs bgrigs / kyo ad grangs arpad zhus bgrigs byas pa yin kyang // drang ma rtegs dbang gis cad lhagsegs yod nges te/ spyi la rabyad / 
500b4(cha): sngen lo nga lnga brgya lhag nas gangs can nad kyi yul du yi ga' par chang 'jzugs brkun dang // se gzhi legs bgrigs byas pa'i 'grems sel yengs khyab byed srel dad zin na'ang / g.yung dung ben gyi dse gzhi' bsdung // 
500b5(cha): bgrigs byed pa'o ga rkabs kyi thed yug de tsam byung med pas/ 'di phyegs la nyams myeng dang lag len segs la mig nes len gni dken pas gam cha gsad du yin pa dang / sghes su ded zhus bgrigs pa che yang 
500b6(cha): mkhyen dpbyed dab 'byams pa min thar/ 'di'i thad mthun rkyen zung la 'gal rkyen mang ba'i gseb ru dal brling 'grig pa dang ma byung na/ phyegs gang pa'i khed yug dang gnas sangs tshag las brgal ba'i legs cha zhig / 
501a1(cha): / hyo/ cig comc po// sogs kyi dzos / gcig mtson nas p ko dgthon gtso sro bo 'o/ 
501a2(cha): gnang do co nang / 'ola byas pa'is kyang ad du gsung du ben hugi ln gi bstan 'don po mi ga la dag 'brog po' nam tsha'
501a3(cha): grabs bsdegs tsham du 'gyud rnams che ba bcas/ 'byung ldan hoordab byang ge ma tbrul lo' zla ches / 
501a4(cha): nyen/ pyo la rabnyan/ s+dzobyung po nang cen dgon na yon dpe thus chan pas/ 
501a5(cha): cos/
